result.summary: lotteon.com exposes one documented seller-focused HTTP OpenAPI at `https://openapi.lotteon.com`, authenticated with a seller-issued bearer API key tied to registered source IPs; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on the domain.
result.description: LOTTE ON is a Korean e-commerce marketplace operated by Lotte Shopping. Its seller platform includes onboarding, seller-office tools, and APIs for managing products, orders, shipping, returns, customer service, settlement, and logistics.

lotteon_openapi_key.label: LOTTE ON OpenAPI authentication key
lotteon_openapi_key.setup: You must be a LOTTE ON seller. First complete seller onboarding via the [seller onboarding guide](https://support.lotteon.com/joinInform/) and sign in to the [Seller Center](https://store.lotteon.com). Then go to `판매자정보 > OpenAPI 관리 > 정보설정`, register the calling server IP address (or select a seller tool), and click the key issuance button to mint an OpenAPI key. The docs note keys are valid for 1 year and up to 3 keys can be issued per top-level seller account.

requiredHeaders.name: Accept
requiredHeaders.description: Docs say `application/json` and `application/xml` are supported; examples use `application/json`.

requiredHeaders.name: Accept-Language
requiredHeaders.description: Docs say use `ko` for domestic access.

requiredHeaders.name: Content-Type
requiredHeaders.description: Required for POST requests according to the docs.
